text:
In the tranquil town of Willow Creek lived an eccentric inventor named Harold Finch. Harold was known for his outlandish gadgets and his refusal to grow up, often dressing in a blend of 1950s mod style and futuristic gear. His latest creation was a talking robot named Harold Junior.

One sunny afternoon, Harold Junior rolled out of Harold's workshop onto the street. "Good morning!" chirped Harold Junior. Harold waved. "I've got a problem. I've collected 987 golden apples."

Harold Junior, equipped with a knowledge database and a vocabulary surprisingly sophisticated beyond his age, turned to Harold. "Golden apples? Those are from Pomeronius's orchards. You have too many. What do you want to do?"

Harold thought for a moment. "Hmm. I think I'd like a feast." He pulled out a recipe book. "Golden-apple casserole. Just what I need!"

So Harold Junior set to work. He stuffed the apples with cheese
